name: Apollo → Instantly Cold Email Engine
description: Scrape leads from Apollo by ICP criteria, enrich them, push to Instantly campaign with AI-personalized first lines.

client_variables.value_proposition: One sentence describing what you solve for the prospect

setup_steps: Create Apollo saved search with client's ICP filters
Export Apollo CSV or connect Apollo API
Create Instantly sending account and warm it for 2 weeks
Configure n8n workflow: Apollo trigger → AI enrichment → Instantly push
Set up personalization prompt with client's value prop and tone
Configure sending limits and schedule in Instantly
Run test batch of 5-10 leads in dry-run mode
Review generated emails with client for tone approval
n8n_workflow_nodes: Instantly API - Add lead to campaign

email_sequence.template: AI-personalized cold email with hook + pain point + soft CTA
Short bump email referencing original message
Share relevant case study or insight, re-offer consultation
